assistant.name: Nyumbani Virtual Receptionist
assistant.greeting: Welcome to Nyumbani Hotel Kampala 🌿 How may I assist you today?
assistant.purpose: Help guests with hotel information, accommodation, restaurant, events, facilities, location and reservations.

hotel.name: Nyumbani Hotel Kampala
hotel.slogan: Your Home Away From Home in Kampala
hotel.address: George Sserwadda Road, Plot 404/405, Makerere Kikoni, P.O. Box 33506, Kampala Uganda
hotel.description: Nyumbani Hotel Kampala offers comfortable accommodation, quality dining, events and warm hospitality for business travellers, tourists, families and guests visiting Kampala.
hotel.experience: A peaceful, comfortable and welcoming hotel environment combining accommodation, dining, celebrations and business facilities.

contact.message: For reservations, enquiries and assistance, guests can contact Nyumbani Hotel reception.

process: Reservations team confirms availability and booking
booking.booking_message: Thank you for choosing Nyumbani Hotel Kampala. Our reservations team will assist you with your booking.

rooms.overview: Nyumbani Hotel Kampala has 55 comfortable guest rooms including Deluxe Single, Deluxe Double and Executive Rooms. Each room is designed to provide a relaxing and homely experience for business and leisure travellers.
common_questions: Which room is best for business travellers?

room_types.name: Deluxe Single Room
room_types.description: A comfortable room ideal for a single guest looking for a relaxing and affordable stay in Kampala.

room_types.name: Deluxe Double Room
room_types.description: A warm and comfortable room designed for couples or guests travelling together.

room_types.name: Executive Room
room_types.description: A spacious premium room suitable for business travellers and guests looking for extra comfort.

restaurant.name: Nyumbani Hotel Restaurant
restaurant.description: Nyumbani Hotel Restaurant serves freshly prepared meals using quality regional products in a comfortable and relaxed atmosphere.
questions: What time does the restaurant open?

events.description: Nyumbani Hotel Kampala provides elegant venues for weddings, celebrations, meetings and private events.
events.capacity: Event halls can accommodate approximately 130 to 500 guests.
questions: Do you have a conference hall?

facilities.description: Nyumbani Hotel provides modern facilities designed for business travellers, tourists and guests seeking comfort during their stay.

guest_services.check_in: Guests can contact reception for check-in arrangements and room availability.
guest_services.check_out: Guests should confirm their departure arrangements with hotel reception.
guest_services.wifi: Free high speed Wi-Fi is available for guests.
guest_services.security: Nyumbani Hotel provides a secure and comfortable environment for all guests.
guest_services.airport_transfer: Airport and city transfer services are available.
guest_services.workstation: Guests can work from the hotel using workstation facilities with computers, fast internet, printers, scanners and photocopiers.

popular_questions.question: Where is Nyumbani Hotel located?
popular_questions.answer: Nyumbani Hotel Kampala is located at George Sserwadda Road, Plot 404/405, Makerere Kikoni, Kampala Uganda.

popular_questions.question: How many rooms does Nyumbani Hotel have?
popular_questions.answer: Nyumbani Hotel has 55 comfortable guest rooms including Deluxe Single, Deluxe Double and Executive Rooms.

popular_questions.question: Do you provide Wi-Fi?
popular_questions.answer: Yes. Nyumbani Hotel provides free high speed Wi-Fi for guests.

popular_questions.question: Do you host weddings?
popular_questions.answer: Yes. Nyumbani Hotel hosts weddings, celebrations, meetings and private events.

popular_questions.question: How many people can your halls accommodate?
popular_questions.answer: Our event halls can accommodate approximately 130 to 500 guests.

popular_questions.question: What is the cheapest room?
popular_questions.answer: The Deluxe Single Room starts from $50 per night.

assistant_actions.unknown_question: I would be happy to help. Please ask me about rooms, restaurant, events, facilities, location or reservations.

after_chat.message: Thank you for chatting with Nyumbani Hotel Kampala 🌿 Would you like to visit our official website or contact reception?

brand.experience: A calm and welcoming hotel experience where guests feel at home.
